title: gnome-shell and gsettings-desktop-schemas bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
gnome-shell
[40.10-26]
- Allow restart/shutdown on lock screen
  Resolves: RHEL-107253

gsettings-desktop-schemas
[40.0-7]
- Add an option to enable restart/shutdown at lockscreen
  Resolves: RHEL-103998
full_text:
gnome-shell
[40.10-26]
- Allow restart/shutdown on lock screen
  Resolves: RHEL-107253

gsettings-desktop-schemas
[40.0-7]
- Add an option to enable restart/shutdown at lockscreen
  Resolves: RHEL-103998

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-15875.html
